jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Command stale RUNNING reconciliation and route regressions passed 19/19; neighboring deployment/operation-task tests passed 11/11
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted and active; /api/status healthy; /api/commands returned 401; /operation-tasks and /deployments returned 307; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P6 command/deployment task reconciliation after in-process worker loss
lastRun.summary: Command list reads now recover stale RUNNING command requests older than the execution window. Requests with queued/running targets are marked FAILED with clear recovery logs if their in-process SSH worker was likely lost after service restart; requests whose targets are already terminal are archived to COMPLETED/FAILED based on target state.
validation: no overlapping remediation/build/test process found other than language servers
systemctl restart vcontrolhub-next.service vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service succeeded; both active
recent production logs checked with no error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: Production services restarted and smoke-tested successfully.
lastRun.nextTarget: Continue P6 durable command/deployment background worker model: explicit cancellation controls, restart-surviving queue claims, and task status reconciliation beyond stale recovery.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
